profile.name: Adedo Lukmon
profile.title: Senior Geospatial Engineer
profile.summary: Geodatabase Specialist and GIS Analyst with expertise in remote sensing, spatial data management, and telecom network surveying. Adept at leveraging geospatial technologies to drive operational efficiency and data-driven decision making.

projects.title: TELECOM Optic-Fibre Route Surveys
projects.description: Led end-to-end TELECOM optic-fibre route surveys for IHS tower sites across Imo and Sokoto states—physically surveying and mapping 62 km of proposed FTTH underground cable routes and identifying optimised alternative alignments to reduce route length and construction cost.

projects.title: Lagos State Blue Rail Project
projects.description: Conducted preference and intercept surveys for the Lagos State Blue Rail Project, collecting primary spatial and attitudinal data from bus and ferry passengers to feed into transport modelling and policy design.

projects.title: Utility Network Modernisation
projects.description: Integrated multi-source geospatial data into a unified distribution-network view, harmonising schemas and resolving interoperability conflicts across internal systems.
